app.title: Dev Toolbox
app.loadError: Failed to load the tool. Refresh the page and try again.
app.privacy: Everything runs in your browser. Your data is never sent to any server.
app.homeDesc: 25+ tools for your daily developer tasks — JSON, JWT, Base64, hash, regex and more. All in your browser, works offline. Your data never leaves the page.
app.homeCta: Pick a tool or search with ⌘K / Ctrl+K

color.hint: Enter a HEX value, use the picker, or type manually.

http.search: Search code or name (404, not found...)

palette.hint: Click a color to copy it.

base64.name: Base64 Encode / Decode
base64.desc: Convert text to Base64 or back. UTF-8 and emoji safe.

url.name: URL Encode / Decode
url.desc: Safely encode or decode URL components (percent-encoding).

html.name: HTML Entity Encode / Decode
html.desc: Escape special characters to HTML entities (<, & ...) or back.

jwt.name: JWT Decoder
jwt.desc: Read a JWT's header and payload. Signature is not verified; data stays in your browser.

json-escape.name: JSON String Escape
json-escape.desc: Escape text to embed inside a JSON string, or unescape it back.

image-base64.name: Image → Base64
image-base64.desc: Convert an image to a Base64 data URI, ready to embed in HTML/CSS.

uuid.name: UUID Generator
uuid.desc: Generate random (v4) or time-ordered (v7) UUID/GUID values.

hash.name: Hash Generator
hash.desc: Compute MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256 and SHA-512 digests of text.

lorem.name: Lorem Ipsum
lorem.desc: Generate placeholder text for design and testing.

qr.name: QR Code Generator
qr.desc: Create a QR code from text or a link and download as PNG.

json-yaml.name: JSON ↔ YAML
json-yaml.desc: Two-way conversion between JSON and YAML.

json-csv.name: JSON → CSV
json-csv.desc: Convert an array of objects to CSV or TSV (Excel compatible).

timestamp.name: Timestamp Converter
timestamp.desc: Convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates.

base.name: Number Base Converter
base.desc: Convert between binary, octal, decimal and hexadecimal.

color.name: Color Converter
color.desc: Convert between HEX, RGB and HSL color formats.

color-palette.name: Color Palette Generator
color-palette.desc: Generate a tonal scale and harmony (complementary, analogous, triadic) colors from one color.

css-units.name: CSS Unit Converter
css-units.desc: Convert between px, rem and em based on the root font size.

json-format.name: JSON Formatter
json-format.desc: Beautify or minify JSON and validate it.

sql-format.name: SQL Formatter
sql-format.desc: Turn messy SQL queries into clean, readable formatting.

xml-format.name: XML Formatter
xml-format.desc: Indent and prettify XML / SOAP / RSS content.

markdown.name: Markdown Preview
markdown.desc: Render Markdown live, side by side with its HTML output.

case.name: Case Converter
case.desc: Convert text to camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case and more. Turkish aware.

lines.name: Line Tools
lines.desc: Sort lines, remove duplicates, trim whitespace.

slugify.name: Slug Generator
slugify.desc: Turn titles into URL and SEO friendly slugs. Turkish character aware.

deasciify.name: Turkish → ASCII
deasciify.desc: Convert Turkish characters to ASCII equivalents (ç→c, ş→s, ğ→g...).

diff.name: Text Diff
diff.desc: Compare two texts line by line and see additions and deletions.

text-stats.name: Text Statistics
text-stats.desc: Count characters, words, lines, sentences, bytes and reading time.

regex.name: Regex Tester
regex.desc: Test regular expressions live and highlight matches.

cron.name: Cron Explainer
cron.desc: Translate cron expressions into plain language.

url-parse.name: URL Parser
url-parse.desc: Break a URL into protocol, host, path and query parameters.

curl.name: cURL → fetch
curl.desc: Convert a curl command into equivalent JavaScript fetch() code.

chmod.name: chmod Calculator
chmod.desc: Compute Unix file permissions in octal (755) and symbolic (rwxr-xr-x).

http-status.name: HTTP Status Codes
http-status.desc: Search HTTP status codes with plain-language descriptions (404, 500, 301...).
